label: Ashfall Ledgerhouse
description: Ashfall Ledgerhouse serves as a fortified warehouse of black basalt and slagcrete, its windowless walls banded with rusted ceramite strapping against ash-driven abrasion. The interior is divided by numbered aisles of cage-stacks and sealed munitorum pallets, with overhead chain-rails and a recessed tally bay protected behind plasteel shutters. Electrostatic stormlight leaks through narrow clerestory slits, casting violet reflections across vitrified flooring scored by heavy hauler tracks. Vox-suppression baffles and insulated conduit runs line the rafters, built to preserve inventory integrity amid Ashenward City’s constant atmospheric interference.
